sector_summary: The top sectors include Technology, Energy, Consumer Staples, and Healthcare, all showing medium confidence levels. Notably, the Financials sector has a conflict between negative price momentum and positive news flow, indicating uncertainty. Similarly, Clean Energy also faces conflicting signals, which may affect its attractiveness.
